hypothesis: If MACE, NequIP, and ViSNet are implemented and trained in a JAX-based MLIP library—using EMA and the specified training schedule—and a gated, species-dependent-edge MACE variant is employed, then GPU molecular dynamics simulations will run faster than Torch+ASE baselines while maintaining comparable energy/force accuracy because XLA compilation and the architectural modifications reduce inference overhead without sacrificing model expressivity.
